description:
Under `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → Practical backlog summary Tier 2 current-task lifecycle.

Refine OM task-state representation so primary user goals, secondary pending items, waiting-for-user states, and assistant next actions are distinct instead of being blended into one blunt field.
title: Separate primary goal, secondary pending items, waiting state, and next-action guidance in OM state
